title: Rethinking the shape of design teams in an AI world
description: As AI reshapes the design process, traditional team hierarchies are becoming obsolete. This article explores how organizations must adopt a "dual transformation" model to balance high-level strategic thinking with hands-on execution, preparing teams and future generations for an AI-augmented workplace.

title: Becoming an AI-native designer
description: Drawing from seven years of design experience, this guide reveals how designers can fundamentally shift their approach by building tacit knowledge and creating their own frameworks for AI collaboration. It's essential reading for designers looking to stay relevant as AI becomes central to the design process.

title: Claude Design: Figma Killer or Just Another Design Tool?
description: Anthropic's new Claude Design tool is making waves in the product design space with AI-powered capabilities. This critical analysis explores whether it's a genuine Figma alternative or simply another incremental tool, helping designers decide what's worth their attention.

title: The misrepresentation of "good taste" as a core design skill
description: This thought-provoking piece challenges one of design's most overused and misleading concepts. By deconstructing what "good taste" actually means in UX design, it offers clarity for both designers and leaders trying to build stronger, more intentional design practices.

title: Test smart: how to approach AI and stay sane?
description: As the line between human expertise and AI-assisted results blurs, this practical guide offers concrete strategies for designers to maintain quality and sanity while leveraging AI tools. It's a grounded, realistic take on befriending—not fearing—new technology.

title: Are we makers by nature — or consumers by design?
description: This philosophical essay examines how digital design has rewired human behavior from creation to consumption, and challenges designers to reconsider their role in shaping society. It's essential reading for anyone thinking beyond aesthetics to the deeper impact of their work.

title: New Claude Code Desktop App
description: Anthropic's redesigned Claude Code desktop app is now available, and this review breaks down both the improvements and limitations of the new version. A timely look at how AI coding assistants are evolving and what designers should know about development tools.

title: We become what we behold
description: A nuanced discussion exploring how AI is reshaping designer roles and responsibilities in an increasingly automated world. This reflective piece examines what we're becoming as a discipline when we outsource core creative tasks to algorithms.
